author: houxinyue
text: Progress recorded: UI v0 now uses a light document-centric theme (white surfaces, gray-blue text, orange actions), click-control scan animation removed, favicon replaced with compact static SVG, Header logo enlarged, PDF empty state changed to a restrained orbit motif, and a dedicated fusion_mark_orbit_core.svg asset was added for the center mark. Dev server verified at http://127.0.0.1:5173. OpenSpec validation passed; final pnpm build after the last asset/orbit tweaks is still pending.

author: houxinyue
text: Progress recorded: frontend/backend main integration is manually verified by user. URL task submission, WebSocket progress, completed PDF download, center highlight PDF preview, and extraction result modal are working. Extraction modal now provides direct entities JSONL download and embeds LangExtract HTML via iframe. web-pc/README.md was synchronized with current integration behavior. Remaining unchecked item: pnpm.cmd build not rerun in this session.
